author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Adding cuBLAS-backed gpu_matmul to ferrotorch-gpu. CUDA 12.8 toolkit installed at /usr/local/cuda-12.8 with libcublas.so. cudarc 0.19 has cuBLAS bindings via the cublas feature. Will add cublas feature to cudarc dep, implement gpu_matmul using cudarc's cublas::CudaBlas, and add to GpuTensor.
